meta.title: Adopt HELIX in a new project

narration: Day one. You point Claude or Codex at an existing repo. No HELIX yet. The agent has no idea what the project cares about.

output:
Installing HELIX skill into ~/.claude/skills/...
✓ skill: helix
✓ artifact templates: 32 types under helix/workflows/

narration: The skill lands. No CLI to learn. The agent now knows the artifact catalog.

assistant: Scanning for HELIX-governed artifacts under docs/helix/...
No HELIX artifacts yet. Two ways in:

output:
1. Frame mode — author vision, PRD, and feature specs from templates
  2. Backfill mode — read your existing code/docs and propose an artifact graph

narration: That's adoption. One install, one ask. No CLI, no config dance.
